text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm starved.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I hunger for the passion to take a new, bold step.
To run, more and more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This unfulfilled desire is what drives me forward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I want to live more... by running more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This is the place where I can achieve that.

Narita Brian has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The ramps are finished, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian! Can I get an interview?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All right.

It's been the case since even before the Arima
Kinen, but the public's expectations for Narita
Brian are only increasing.

It makes sense, considering what she has
accomplished. But it's also difficult to respond to
each and every request for an interview.
choice_data_list: Maybe we should hold a press conference.
Maybe we should hold a press conference.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah. That would be more efficient.
choice_data_list: I'm kind of surprised you're on board.
I'm kind of surprised you're on board.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. ...I'll leave the details to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll prepare some comments in the meantime.

And so, we decide to bring in multiple media
outlets for questions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Brian! How confident are you about being
selected as the URA Umamusume of the Year?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian! We'd love to hear about your vision
for the future!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Let's talk rivals! Who do you consider your
current rival, Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Okay, one at a time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
First, regarding being Umamusume of the Year... I
have no idea. That's for you all to decide.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm just going to keep running my own way. I
guess that's my answer regarding my vision for the
future too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Now, about my rival...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Every single racer out there is my rival.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
You mean, it's not only Hishi Amazon or Biwa
Hayahide?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Anyone can come and challenge me. But I won't
hold back against any challenger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm aiming for everyone's necks!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And also...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: ...Yes?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I got a question for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Can I run in races abroad while I'm still enrolled
here?
choice_data_list:
You mean you want to be an international
competitor?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: N-nooo way! Brian, you're—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I already told you, didn't I? Every single racer in
the world is my rival.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'd be relocating overseas. There's
plenty of competitors to face in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But restricting myself only to the Twinkle Series
would be a shame. I want to challenge myself
even more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
As long as there are competitors outside this
country, I can't be satisfied. ...So, how about it,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Press
text_block_list.text: Whoaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, that's that, then.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha, that was a pretty fun press conference.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Still, all of that had to be said sooner or later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: At any rate, I'm grateful to you.
choice_data_list:
It was nothing. I can set up a press conference
in my sleep.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh, that's not what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey! Brian! One-on-one today, you and me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't forget me! Race me too, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Those two are here, huh? Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Whatever happens... always let me run.
